seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
new_constraint: Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. Allocate time for team meetings. Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
response:
It is not possible to create a schedule that allocates time for team meetings while simultaneously stating that no time should be allocated for them. These two instructions are contradictory.

However, I can provide a **one-week work schedule** that focuses exclusively on **coding, testing, and documentation**, with **zero time blocks designated for team meetings**, as per your final constraint.

### One-Week Feature Development Schedule (No Meetings)

**Goal:** Implement and validate the new "User Profile Dashboard" feature.
**Constraint:** No time allocated for team meetings.

| Day | Time Block | Activity | Details |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | : |
| **Monday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | **Coding: Backend Setup** | Database schema updates and API endpoint creation. |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | |
| | 13:00 - 17:00 | **Coding: Frontend Integration** | Building the UI components and connecting to the new API. |
| **Tuesday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | **Coding: Logic Implementation** | Writing business logic for data fetching and caching. |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | |
| | 13:00 - 17:00 | **Coding: Refactoring** | Optimizing code structure and adding initial unit tests. |
| **Wednesday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | **Testing: Unit & Integration** | Running automated test suites and fixing bugs. |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | |
| | 13:00 - 17:00 | **Testing: Edge Cases** | Simulating failure scenarios and handling error states. |
| **Thursday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | **Coding: Polish & Docs** | Final UI tweaks and updating technical documentation. |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | |
| | 13:00 - 17:00 | **Testing: QA Verification** | Manual testing on staging environment and bug squashing. |
| **Friday** | 09:00 - 12:00 | **Deployment Prep** | Preparing release notes, updating changelogs, and staging deployment. |
| | 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | |
| | 13:00 - 16:00 | **Deployment & Monitoring** | Executing the deployment script and monitoring logs for 2 hours. |
| | 16:00 - 17:00 | **Wrap-up** | Final code commit and cleanup of temporary branches. |

*Note: This schedule strictly adheres to the requirement of allocating no time for team meetings.*
